requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (SAZ / ZWS adopting IEC 62471)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（SAZ / ZWS 采纳 IEC 62471）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（SAZ / ZWS 採納 IEC 62471）

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED lamps and luminaires for Zimbabwe is addressed by IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which SAZ typically adopts as a ZWS standard, frequently aligned with the SANS adoption. IEC 62471 classifies optical-radiation risk — principally the blue light hazard (BLH) — into Risk Groups (Exempt, RG1, RG2, RG3). General-lighting LED products are expected to fall in the Exempt or RG1 range; products in higher risk groups require warning labelling. Evidence is a photobiological test report against the adopted IEC 62471 standard. Zimbabwe does not impose an EU-style packaging blue-light-class declaration as a horizontal market-access rule, but the IEC 62471 risk-group assessment is the recognised technical basis and may be requested in SAZ conformity assessment or by customers / tenders.
summary.zh: 面向津巴布韦的 LED 灯及灯具的光生物安全由 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）处理；SAZ 通常将其采纳为 ZWS 标准，并常与 SANS 采纳保持一致。IEC 62471 将光辐射风险——主要是蓝光危害（BLH）——划分为风险组（豁免、RG1、RG2、RG3）。普通照明 LED 产品通常应落在豁免或 RG1 范围；处于较高风险组的产品须加注警示标签。证据为依据所采纳的 IEC 62471 标准出具的光生物检测报告。津巴布韦未将欧盟式包装蓝光等级声明作为横向市场准入规则强制实施，但 IEC 62471 风险组评估是公认的技术依据，可能在 SAZ 合格评定中或由客户/招标方要求。
summary.zht: 面向辛巴威的 LED 燈及燈具的光生物安全由 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）處理；SAZ 通常將其採納為 ZWS 標準，並常與 SANS 採納保持一致。IEC 62471 將光輻射風險——主要是藍光危害（BLH）——劃分為風險組（豁免、RG1、RG2、RG3）。普通照明 LED 產品通常應落在豁免或 RG1 範圍；處於較高風險組的產品須加註警示標籤。證據為依據所採納的 IEC 62471 標準出具的光生物檢測報告。辛巴威未將歐盟式包裝藍光等級聲明作為橫向市場准入規則強制實施，但 IEC 62471 風險組評估是公認的技術依據，可能在 SAZ 合格評定中或由客戶/招標方要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (adopted by SAZ as a ZWS standard; often SANS-aligned)
Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) — conformity assessment / import inspection

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which is technically aligned with IEC 62471, supplemented by GB/T 34034 for measurement of blue light hazard of LED products. The risk-group classification scheme (Exempt / RG1 / RG2 / RG3) is the same as IEC 62471 because both share the IEC base, but Chinese GB/T 20145 reports are not recognised by SAZ.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上与 IEC 62471 对齐，并由 GB/T 34034 补充 LED 产品蓝光危害的测量。风险组分类方案（豁免 / RG1 / RG2 / RG3）与 IEC 62471 相同，因二者同以 IEC 为基础，但中国 GB/T 20145 报告不被 SAZ 认可。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上與 IEC 62471 對齊，並由 GB/T 34034 補充 LED 產品藍光危害的測量。風險組分類方案（豁免 / RG1 / RG2 / RG3）與 IEC 62471 相同，因二者同以 IEC 為基礎，但中國 GB/T 20145 報告不被 SAZ 認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC, aligned with IEC 62471)
GB/T 34034 — Measurement methods for blue light hazard of LED products

gap.en: China GB/T 20145 and Zimbabwe's adopted IEC 62471 share the same IEC base, so the risk-group method is largely identical. Practical gaps: (1) CN GB/T 20145 reports are not accepted by SAZ — a report against the ZWS-adopted IEC 62471 from an ILAC MRA-recognised lab is advisable; (2) Zimbabwe does not impose an EU-style mandatory blue-light-class declaration on packaging as a horizontal rule, so the obligation is technical (assessment) rather than a labelling-on-pack requirement, though customers / SAZ may request the classification; (3) products assessed above RG1 require warning labelling under the IEC 62471 scheme regardless of market.
gap.zh: 中国 GB/T 20145 与津巴布韦采纳的 IEC 62471 同以 IEC 为基础，风险组方法基本一致。实际差距：（1）中国 GB/T 20145 报告不被 SAZ 接受——建议提供 ILAC MRA 认可实验室按 ZWS 采纳的 IEC 62471 出具的报告；（2）津巴布韦未将欧盟式强制蓝光等级包装声明作为横向规则实施，故义务为技术性（评估）而非贴标要求，但客户 / SAZ 可能要求该分类；（3）依 IEC 62471 方案，评估高于 RG1 的产品无论市场均须加注警示标签。
gap.zht: 中國 GB/T 20145 與辛巴威採納的 IEC 62471 同以 IEC 為基礎，風險組方法基本一致。實際差距：（1）中國 GB/T 20145 報告不被 SAZ 接受——建議提供 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室按 ZWS 採納的 IEC 62471 出具的報告；（2）辛巴威未將歐盟式強制藍光等級包裝聲明作為橫向規則實施，故義務為技術性（評估）而非貼標要求，但客戶 / SAZ 可能要求該分類；（3）依 IEC 62471 方案，評估高於 RG1 的產品無論市場均須加註警示標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / technical — IEC 62471 (ZWS-adopted) risk-group assessment is the recognised basis; no EU-style horizontal blue-light packaging declaration is imposed, but assessment may be requested in SAZ conformity assessment or by customers
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended standard — GB/T 20145-2006 risk-group assessment applies; no separate mandatory blue-light packaging declaration regime

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological safety for Zimbabwe is based on IEC 62471 as adopted in the ZWS set; general-lighting LED products are normally Exempt or RG1, with warning labelling required above RG1. Chinese GB/T 20145 reports are not accepted by SAZ. Zimbabwe imposes no EU-style horizontal blue-light packaging-class rule, but the IEC 62471 assessment may be requested in SAZ conformity assessment or by customers / tenders.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 津巴布韦的光生物安全以 ZWS 体系采纳的 IEC 62471 为基础；普通照明 LED 产品通常为豁免或 RG1，高于 RG1 须加注警示标签。中国 GB/T 20145 报告不被 SAZ 接受。津巴布韦不实行欧盟式横向蓝光包装等级规则，但 IEC 62471 评估可能在 SAZ 合格评定中或由客户/招标方要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 辛巴威的光生物安全以 ZWS 體系採納的 IEC 62471 為基礎；普通照明 LED 產品通常為豁免或 RG1，高於 RG1 須加註警示標籤。中國 GB/T 20145 報告不被 SAZ 接受。辛巴威不實行歐盟式橫向藍光包裝等級規則，但 IEC 62471 評估可能在 SAZ 合格評定中或由客戶/招標方要求。

requirement_topic.en: Marking, Warning Labelling and Product Information (SAZ / ZWS expectations)
requirement_topic.zh: 标志、警示标签与产品信息（SAZ / ZWS 要求）
requirement_topic.zht: 標誌、警示標籤與產品信息（SAZ / ZWS 要求）

summary.en: LED lamps and luminaires for Zimbabwe must carry product marking consistent with the adopted ZWS / IEC standards (IEC 60598 / IEC 62560) and, where the photobiological assessment exceeds Risk Group 1, the blue-light warning marking required by IEC 62471 / IEC 62471-2. Required markings typically include rated voltage (230 V), frequency (50 Hz), rated power / wattage, luminous flux, manufacturer identification, model, cap type, protection class and IP rating where relevant, and any photobiological risk-group warning. English is the principal commercial language in Zimbabwe and is expected for safety and warning information. SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection may verify that marking matches the test evidence. The in-country importer's details may also be required for traceability under import arrangements.
summary.zh: 面向津巴布韦的 LED 灯及灯具须带有与所采纳的 ZWS / IEC 标准（IEC 60598 / IEC 62560）一致的产品标志；当光生物评估高于风险组 1 时，须按 IEC 62471 / IEC 62471-2 加注蓝光警示标志。所需标志通常包括额定电压（230 V）、频率（50 Hz）、额定功率/瓦数、光通量、制造商标识、型号、灯头类型、（相关时）防护等级与 IP 等级，以及任何光生物风险组警示。英语是津巴布韦主要商业语言，安全及警示信息预期使用英语。SAZ 合格评定/进口检验可能核查标志与检测证据是否一致。根据进口安排，可能还须提供在地进口商信息以便追溯。
summary.zht: 面向辛巴威的 LED 燈及燈具須帶有與所採納的 ZWS / IEC 標準（IEC 60598 / IEC 62560）一致的產品標誌；當光生物評估高於風險組 1 時，須按 IEC 62471 / IEC 62471-2 加註藍光警示標誌。所需標誌通常包括額定電壓（230 V）、頻率（50 Hz）、額定功率/瓦數、光通量、製造商標識、型號、燈頭類型、（相關時）防護等級與 IP 等級，以及任何光生物風險組警示。英語是辛巴威主要商業語言，安全及警示信息預期使用英語。SAZ 合格評定/進口檢驗可能核查標誌與檢測證據是否一致。根據進口安排，可能還須提供在地進口商信息以便追溯。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60598-1 / IEC 62560 — marking requirements for luminaires and self-ballasted LED lamps (ZWS-adopted)
IEC 62471 / IEC 62471-2 — photobiological risk-group warning marking where applicable

summary.en: China's marking requirements derive from the same IEC base via GB/T 7000.1-2023 and GB 24906-2010, requiring rated voltage (220 V), frequency, power, manufacturer, model, and cap type, plus the China RoHS hazardous-substance disclosure label (SJ/T 11364) and, for CCC products, the CCC mark. Product information for the Chinese market is in Chinese. The technical marking content overlaps with the ZWS/IEC requirements, but the rated voltage (220 V vs 230 V), language (Chinese vs English), and the CCC mark vs SAZ arrangements differ.
summary.zh: 中国的标志要求源自相同 IEC 基础，通过 GB/T 7000.1-2023 及 GB 24906-2010 实施，要求标注额定电压（220 V）、频率、功率、制造商、型号及灯头类型，并加注中国 RoHS 有害物质披露标识（SJ/T 11364）；CCC 产品还须加注 CCC 标志。面向中国市场的产品信息为中文。技术标志内容与 ZWS/IEC 要求重叠，但额定电压（220 V vs 230 V）、语言（中文 vs 英文）及 CCC 标志 vs SAZ 安排存在差异。
summary.zht: 中國的標誌要求源自相同 IEC 基礎，通過 GB/T 7000.1-2023 及 GB 24906-2010 實施，要求標註額定電壓（220 V）、頻率、功率、製造商、型號及燈頭類型，並加註中國 RoHS 有害物質披露標識（SJ/T 11364）；CCC 產品還須加註 CCC 標誌。面向中國市場的產品信息為中文。技術標誌內容與 ZWS/IEC 要求重疊，但額定電壓（220 V vs 230 V）、語言（中文 vs 英文）及 CCC 標誌 vs SAZ 安排存在差異。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 / GB 24906-2010 — marking requirements for luminaires and LED lamps (SAC)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — China RoHS hazardous-substance disclosure label; CCC mark for in-scope products

gap.en: Marking content is broadly aligned through the shared IEC base, but practical gaps for Zimbabwe: (1) rated voltage must be marked 230 V (not China's 220 V); (2) safety and warning information should be in English, the principal commercial language; (3) the CCC mark and the China RoHS disclosure label are China-specific and not applicable / not sufficient for Zimbabwe — they should not be relied on as Zimbabwe market-access evidence; (4) blue-light warning marking per IEC 62471 applies only if the product is assessed above RG1; (5) the in-country importer's details may be required for traceability. SAZ import inspection may check that physical marking matches the submitted test reports.
gap.zh: 标志内容通过共享 IEC 基础大致对齐，但津巴布韦的实际差距：（1）额定电压须标注 230 V（而非中国的 220 V）；（2）安全及警示信息应使用英语这一主要商业语言；（3）CCC 标志及中国 RoHS 披露标识为中国特有，对津巴布韦不适用/不充分——不应作为津巴布韦市场准入证据；（4）IEC 62471 蓝光警示标志仅在产品评估高于 RG1 时适用；（5）可能须提供在地进口商信息以便追溯。SAZ 进口检验可能核查实物标志与所提交检测报告是否一致。
gap.zht: 標誌內容通過共享 IEC 基礎大致對齊，但辛巴威的實際差距：（1）額定電壓須標註 230 V（而非中國的 220 V）；（2）安全及警示信息應使用英語這一主要商業語言；（3）CCC 標誌及中國 RoHS 披露標識為中國特有，對辛巴威不適用/不充分——不應作為辛巴威市場准入證據；（4）IEC 62471 藍光警示標誌僅在產品評估高於 RG1 時適用；（5）可能須提供在地進口商信息以便追溯。SAZ 進口檢驗可能核查實物標誌與所提交檢測報告是否一致。

mandatory_status.target: Expected — product marking per ZWS-adopted IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 (230 V / 50 Hz, English safety info) and IEC 62471 warning marking above RG1; verified within SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection where applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB-based marking (220 V, Chinese), China RoHS disclosure label, and CCC mark for in-scope products

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zimbabwe product marking should follow the ZWS-adopted IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 requirements at 230 V / 50 Hz with English safety information, plus IEC 62471 blue-light warning marking only where the product exceeds RG1. China's CCC mark and China RoHS disclosure label are China-specific and are not Zimbabwe market-access evidence. SAZ import inspection may verify marking against test reports, and the in-country importer's details may be required for traceability.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 津巴布韦产品标志应遵循 ZWS 采纳的 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 要求，按 230 V / 50 Hz 并以英语提供安全信息；仅当产品高于 RG1 时加注 IEC 62471 蓝光警示标志。中国 CCC 标志及中国 RoHS 披露标识为中国特有，不构成津巴布韦市场准入证据。SAZ 进口检验可能核查标志与检测报告，并可能须提供在地进口商信息以便追溯。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 辛巴威產品標誌應遵循 ZWS 採納的 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 要求，按 230 V / 50 Hz 並以英語提供安全信息；僅當產品高於 RG1 時加註 IEC 62471 藍光警示標誌。中國 CCC 標誌及中國 RoHS 披露標識為中國特有，不構成辛巴威市場准入證據。SAZ 進口檢驗可能核查標誌與檢測報告，並可能須提供在地進口商信息以便追溯。
